scenes.text:
One percent better every day.
That is all it takes.

If you improve one percent every day for a year, you will be thirty-seven times better. Not twice. Not ten times. Thirty-seven times. Most
people overestimate what they can do in a day and underestimate what they can do in a year. Tiny gains compound into massive results.

You do not need a complete life overhaul. You need one better decision today. One more
page read. One more rep. One more minute of focus. That is how empires are built.

Small daily disciplines lead
to large eventual achievements.

What is your one percent today?
Comment below. Follow for compound growth.
